Discover the rugged power and commanding presence of this 2007 Dodge Ram 1500 SLT. With its bold HEMI 5.7L V8 engine and 5-speed automatic transmission, this truck delivers the performance and capability you demand. Boasting a sleek black exterior and a well-equipped interior, this Ram 1500 is ready to take on any task with confidence.  - 5.7L HEMI V8 engine with Multi-Displacement System - 5-speed automatic transmission - Anti-spin rear axle - 20" aluminum wheels - P275/60R20 all-season tires - 3.92 axle ratio  This Ram 1500 SLT is packed with features that enhance your driving experience, including power windows, power door locks, remote keyless entry, and speed control. The spacious interior offers comfortable seating for up to six, with a 40/20/40 split-bench front seat and center armrest. Stay connected with the AM/FM radio and CD player, and keep an eye on your vehicle's vital information with the tachometer and trip computer. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same?  With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will. This stunning 2013 Chrysler 300 C Luxury Series is a true head-turner with its sleek black exterior and premium features. Boasting a powerful 3.6L 6-cylinder engine and an impressive 8-speed automatic transmission, this vehicle delivers an exceptional driving experience with a remarkable 31 MPG on the highway.  - Dual-Pane Panoramic Sunroof - Beats Audio Group with 10 premium speakers and 552-watt amplifier - Garmin Navigation System - Memory Seat and Pedal Settings - Power Driver's Seat  The Chrysler 300 C Luxury Series is more than just a stylish sedan - it's a true expression of refined elegance and sophisticated technology. The dual-pane panoramic sunroof floods the cabin with natural light, creating an airy and open atmosphere, while the Beats Audio Group provides a concert-hall-quality sound experience.  Convenience and comfort are at the forefront of this vehicle's design. The memory seat and pedal settings allow you to customize your driving position with the touch of a button, ensuring a personalized and ergonomic experience every time you get behind the wheel. The power driver's seat provides ample support and adjustability, making long drives a breeze.  Beyond the impressive list of features, the Chrysler 300 C Luxury Series also boasts a spacious and well-appointed interior. The genuine wood accents and perforated leather seating surfaces exude an air of refined luxury, while the ample legroom and cargo space ensure that you and your passengers can travel in comfort.  Whether you're commuting to the office or embarking on a weekend getaway, this 2013 Chrysler 300 C Luxury Series is the perfect companion. Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain. description: Some vehicles shout for attention.This one earns it quietly.The 2011 Lexus RX 350 has long been regarded as the gold standard of luxury midsize SUVs, and this front-wheel-drive example in a tan on tan color combination captures exactly why. It's elegant without being loud, refined without being fragile, and comfortable in a way that feels intentional rather than overdone.From the moment you settle into the cabin, the RX 350 reminds you why Lexus dominated owner-satisfaction rankings for years. The interior is calm, insulated, and thoughtfully laid out  a space designed to reduce fatigue and elevate everyday driving. Open the moon roof and the cabin fills with light, giving even a routine commute a relaxed, open-air feel. When backing into a tight parking spot or navigating city streets, the reverse camera adds confidence without intruding on the driving experience.Under the hood, Lexus' legendary 3.5L V6 delivers smooth, linear power that feels effortless rather than aggressive. This drivetrain is a major reason the RX 350 earned a reputation for exceptional long-term dependability, frequently landing at or near the top of J.D. Power reliability rankings and being named among U.S. News & World Report's Best Luxury Midsize SUVs for its blend of comfort, quality, and ownership value. Reviewers consistently praised its quiet ride, build quality, and ability to feel just as composed at 20 mph as it does at 75.What truly separates the RX 350 from competitors is how well it ages. Years later, it still feels solid, tight, and relevant  a testament to Lexus engineering and attention to detail. This is not an SUV built to impress you for a test drive and disappoint you later. It's built to be enjoyed daily, year after year.If you're searching for a luxury SUV that prioritizes comfort, proven reliability, and timeless design over trends and gimmicks, this RX 350 deserves your attention.Available now at Prestige Wholesale, located at 1537 El Camino Avenue, Sacramento, CA. Visit sacbestcar.com to explore financing options or stop by and experience firsthand why the Lexus RX remains one of the most respected luxury SUVs ever built.[!@@Additional Info@@!]V6 3.5 Liter,Cruise Control,Navigation System,Parking Sensors,Automatic 6-Spd w/Overdrive & Sequential Mode,FWD,Tilt & Telescoping Wheel,AM/FM Stereo,Dual Air Bags,CD/MP3 (Multi Disc),Traction Control,Power Windows,Power Door Locks,Bluetooth Wireless,Anti-Theft System,Air Conditioning,Keyless Entry,Power Liftgate Release,Moon Roof,Keyless Start,ABS (4-Wheel),XM Satellite,Daytime Running Lights,Stability Control,Premium Pkg,Power Steering,Lexus Enform,Dual Power Seats,Alloy Wheels,Fog Lights,Backup Camera,F&R Side Air Bags,F&R Head Curtain Air Bags,Heated & Ventilated Seats,Leather,Knee Air Bags,Premium Sound

description: Discover unmatched choice at Westgate Chrysler Jeep Dodge Ram in Raleigh, home to a huge lineup of new vehicles and one of the largest used-car inventories on the east coast with 1,000+ options ready to drive.  This 2007 Honda CR-V EX-L boasts an impressive array of features that make it a standout in the compact SUV segment. With its sleek blue exterior and well-appointed interior, this CR-V is ready to elevate your driving experience.  - CD player - Steering wheel mounted audio controls - Power moonroof - Heated door mirrors - Front Bucket Seats  Stepping inside, you'll find a wealth of comfort and convenience features, including air conditioning, power windows, remote keyless entry, and a host of safety technologies like ABS brakes, dual front airbags, and electronic stability control. The leather-trimmed seating and heated front seats add a touch of luxury, while the split-folding rear seat provides versatile cargo-carrying capabilities.  Powered by a 2.4L I4 DOHC 16V i-VTEC engine and a 5-speed automatic transmission, this CR-V delivers an impressive blend of performance and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 23 mpg in the city and 30 mpg on the highway. The four-wheel independent suspension and speed-sensing steering ensure a smooth and responsive ride, making this CR-V a joy to drive.  With its well-rounded capabilities and impressive list of features, this 2007 Honda CR-V EX-L is an exceptional value in the used-car market. Whether you're looking for a reliable family hauler, a capable weekend adventurer, or a versatile daily driver, this CR-V is sure to exceed your expectations.  Choose Westgate Chrysler Jeep Dodge Ram in Raleigh, NC for a dealership experience built on transparency, value, and customer-first service. With a wide selection of new CJDR models and an extensive inventory of quality used cars, trucks, and SUVs, Westgate is a trusted destination for shoppers across Raleigh, Durham, the Triangle and all of North Carolina. description: ```htmlExplore the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan 4D at Siry Motors in San DiegoLooking for a dependable, stylish, and feature-rich sedan in San Diego, California? The 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan 4D, available now at Siry Motors, is the perfect blend of performance, comfort, and affordability. Whether you're commuting to work, running errands, or planning a weekend getaway, this sedan is designed to meet your needs with ease and efficiency.Why Choose the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan 4D?The 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan is a standout in its class, offering a sleek design, advanced features, and a smooth driving experience. Powered by a 2.5-liter 4-cylinder engine and a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT), this front-wheel-drive sedan delivers an impressive combination of power and fuel efficiency. Whether you're navigating city streets or cruising down the highway, the Altima ensures a confident and enjoyable ride.Performance That ExcitesUnder the hood, the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S features a robust 2.5-liter 4-cylinder engine that provides a balance of power and efficiency. The CVT automatic transmission ensures seamless gear shifts, delivering a smooth and responsive driving experience. With its front-wheel-drive configuration, the Altima offers excellent handling and stability, making it a reliable choice for both city and highway driving.Stylish and Sophisticated DesignThe 2007 Nissan Altima boasts a modern and aerodynamic design that turns heads wherever it goes. Its sleek profile, bold front grille, and stylish alloy wheels give it a premium look that stands out on the road. Whether you're pulling up to the office or heading out for a night on the town, the Altima's sophisticated design ensures you arrive in style.Comfortable and Feature-Packed InteriorStep inside the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan, and you'll find a spacious and well-appointed cabin designed with your comfort in mind. The interior features high-quality materials and thoughtful touches that create a welcoming and enjoyable environment for both driver and passengers.Advanced Entertainment OptionsThe Altima comes equipped with a range of entertainment features to keep you and your passengers entertained on every journey. Enjoy crystal-clear sound quality with the Bose Premium Sound System, which delivers an immersive audio experience. The vehicle also includes an AM/FM stereo, cassette player, and a CD/MP3 single-disc player, giving you multiple options for your favorite music and playlists.Convenience at Your FingertipsThe 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S is designed with convenience in mind. Key features like power windows, power door locks, and power steering make everyday tasks easier and more efficient. The cruise control feature allows you to maintain a steady speed on long drives, reducing fatigue and enhancing your overall driving experience.Safety Features for Peace of MindWhen it comes to safety, the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan has you covered. This sedan is equipped with a suite of safety features designed to protect you and your loved ones on the road.Comprehensive Airbag SystemThe Altima features a comprehensive airbag system that includes dual front airbags and side airbags, providing enhanced protection in the event of a collision. These advanced safety features give you added peace of mind, whether you're driving around town or embarking on a road trip.Reliable Braking SystemWith its 4-wheel ABS (Anti-lock Braking System), the Altima ensures reliable and controlled braking in various road conditions. This feature enhances your vehicle's stability and reduces the risk of skidding, giving you greater confidence behind the wheel.Efficiency and AffordabilityThe 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S is not only a joy to drive but also an economical choice for budget-conscious buyers. Its fuel-efficient engine helps you save on gas, while its affordable price tag makes it an excellent value for a sedan of this caliber. At Siry Motors in San Diego, you'll find this vehicle priced competitively to fit your budget.Why Buy from Siry Motors in San Diego?At Siry Motors, we pride ourselves on offering a wide selection of high-quality pre-owned vehicles, including the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan. Our team is dedicated to helping you find the perfect car to match your needs and lifestyle. Conveniently located in San Diego, California, we make the car-buying process simple, transparent, and stress-free.Wide Selection of Pre-Owned VehiclesIn addition to the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S, Siry Motors offers a diverse inventory of pre-owned cars, trucks, and SUVs. Whether you're looking for a reliable commuter car, a family-friendly SUV, or a sporty coupe, we have something for everyone.Exceptional Customer ServiceOur friendly and knowledgeable staff are here to assist you every step of the way. From answering your questions to helping you explore financing options, we are committed to providing a top-notch car-buying experience. When you choose Siry Motors, you can trust that you're in good hands.Visit Siry Motors in San Diego Today!Don't miss your chance to own the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan 4D. Visit Siry Motors in San Diego, California, today to take this exceptional sedan for a test drive. Experience its performance, comfort, and features firsthand, and see why it's the perfect car for your needs. Contact us now to schedule your visit or to learn more about this incredible vehicle.Contact UsReady to drive home in the 2007 Nissan Altima 2.5 S Sedan? Call or visit Siry Motors in San Diego today. Our team is here to help you every step of the way, from exploring vehicle options to completing your purchase. We look forward to serving you and helping you find your dream car!```

description: Get Up and Call Me Now Where Our Customers Send Their Friends! Since 1964, Superior Motors has been selling used Cars, Trucks, and Vans on the corner of Route 981 and 30, across from the Latrobe Airport. The original owner, Big Jim Barchesky, started this business in 1959 in the backyard of his house in Derry. Jim got into the car business because of his father. His father and uncle owned Barchesky Brothers Chrysler and Plymouth in Derry before they ended the business in 1956. Jim will be forever missed but we hope to continually make him proud. Jims wife, Jane, had always worked alongside him, as well as his son Mike. Still to this day, Jane, Mike, and Mikes children, Kate and Tom, run Superior Motors. If you stop by or follow them on Facebook, you will also notice some of the next generation running around, too. That makes a total of four generations currently at Superior Motors; it is a full family affair! No need to worry about someone making a commission; its just family. Our family takes pride in the 60 years that Superior Motors has been on Route 30, obviously withstanding a good reputation as a used car lot, clearly doing something right.  The Barchesky family strives to continue the family business and provide great value deals for our community's patrons and businesses.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Exhaust Tip Color - Chrome, Grille Color -
